Defines a bitmap image for an error URL with dimensions 109x14 pixels.

# Purpose
The content defines a bitmap image used in a software application. The `error_url_width` and `error_url_height` macros specify the dimensions of the image, which are 109 pixels wide and 14 pixels high. The `error_url_bits` array contains the pixel data for the image, represented as a series of unsigned char values. This data is typically used to render a graphical representation, such as an icon or a small image, within the application. The bitmap is likely used to indicate an error related to a URL, as suggested by the naming convention.
